sections.paragraph: m., congregation, assembly, as קְהַל גֹּויִם Gen 35:11 and קְהַל עַמִּים Gen 28:3 48:4 an assembly, a crowd of nations. Especially the congregation of the people of Israel; fully called קְהַל יִשְׂרָאֵל Deu 31:30 קְהַל יְהֹוָה Num 16:3 20:4 קְהַל הָאֱלֹהִים Neh 13:1 and κατʼ ἐξοχὴν הַקָּהָלּ Exo 16:3 Lev 4:13.
